infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: Dilly saves networking contacts you meet (with a 'Met through Dilly' note) and helps you find warm intros to companies in your phone before applying.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Dilly syncs your application deadlines, interviews, and Chapter sessions to your calendar so they live alongside the rest of your week.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Dilly creates Reminders for application deadlines, interview prep, and weekly career check-ins in a dedicated 'Dilly' list.

plugins.contactsPermission: Dilly saves networking contacts you meet (with a 'Met through Dilly' note) and finds warm intros to companies in your phone before applying.
